name_cn:
Genuine leather
Celin* BESACE Mini Model 🔍196702# Logo Print + Calfskin Saddle Bag, Triomphe Canvas logo print, calfskin trim, fabric lining, crossbody or shoulder carry, flap with metal Triomphe clasp, one main compartment, one flat pocket, adjustable calfskin shoulder strap, continuing the Arc de Triomphe, vintage crossbody 👏Size: 15x11x4cm [Includes retail box 🎁]
